data.body: Hypothesis: _phase_merge() lacks the drift-detection-and-reset block that _phase_sync() has. When --resume skips _phase_sync and enters _phase_merge directly with local main ahead of origin/main (e.g., after interrupted version_bump), the stale version bump commit causes plugin.json conflict on merge retry. Fix: mirror _phase_sync's drift-reset block into _phase_merge after cd MAIN_REPO. RED test: test_merge_phase_resets_stale_ahead_local_main confirmed failing. Approved for implementation.
